ListItem.Para: Remaining transducers are verified to operate normally before each departure.
Slats and flaps alternate mode is verified to operate normally before each departure.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify remaining flap lever position transducers operate normally prior to each departure and verify operation of slat and flaps alternate mode before each departure (AMM DDG 27-51-01).

ListItem.Para: Verify remaining flap lever position transducers operate normally.
Confirm flaps are UP.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
Move flap lever to the F1 position.
Confirm the FLAP/SLAT CONTROL caution message is not displayed.
Move flap lever to the UP position.
Depressurize the hydraulic system.
Verify operation of slat and flaps alternate mode.
Confirm flaps are UP.
For all three hydraulic systems available, turn hydraulics on.
For only one or two of the hydraulic systems available at once:
With hydraulics off, move the speedbrake lever UP.
Pressurize and depressurize hydraulic systems in this sequence: left, right.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system
Confirm that all spoilers are extended.
Select ALTN on the ALTN FLAPS ARM switch.

Note.Para: The FLAP/SLAT CONTROL caution message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Move the ALTN FLAPS selector to EXT.

Note.Para: If hydraulic systems are pressurized, spoilers, ailerons, and flaperons will move during test.

ListItem.Para: After movement of both leading and trailing edges is verified on expanded flap and slat position indications, move the ALTN FLAPS selector to OFF.
Wait at least 30 seconds.
Move the ALTN FLAPS selector to RET until leading and trailing edges are fully retracted.
Move the ALTN FLAPS selector to OFF.
Disarm the ALTN FLAPS ARM switch.
Confirm the FLAP/SLAT CONTROL caution message is not displayed.
Retract spoilers if extended:
With hydraulics off, move the speedbrake lever DN.
Pressurize and depressurize hydraulic systems in this sequence: left, right, center.
Confirm that all spoilers are retracted.
